title: End of Evangelion Manga Force Version
display_title: End of Evangelion Manga Force Version
wikitext:
[]: End of Evangelion Manga Force Version             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Sat Jul 21, 2012 11:40 am By the way, if anyone knows... with the Manga Force version of End of Evangelion does the case ONLY look like this? What I mean is, is what it looks like there only a slipcase and on the inside it looks like the regular DVD cover? Because the cover it has there looks tacky and horrible to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Maya Ibuki » Sun Jul 22, 2012 1:36 am The Manga Force version is more like a re-print of the original Manga DVD (Like Platinum versions of Playstation games). The case inside has the MANGA FORCE logo on in it since it is a newer print. These copies are common on eBay, however are worth less since they're not original prints. They're genuine though. Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Mon Jul 23, 2012 1:42 pm Maya Ibuki wrote: The Manga Force version is more like a re-print of the original Manga DVD (Like Platinum versions of Playstation games). The case inside has the MANGA FORCE logo on in it since it is a newer print. These copies are common on eBay, however are worth less since they're not original prints. They're genuine though. Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Tue Jul 24, 2012 1:26 am This auction would seem to indicate that a variation of the US Death+Rebirth box art (it's clearly from the same Japanese source image , but recomposited along with the addition of the mandatory nanny-state ratings logo) was indeed released to market at some point. I've also seen the 2nd version w/ Kaworu's face around (like in this auction ), but not the one with a different font from the Play.com link you gave. I'm of the opinion that said picture is a promo image or something from a sell-sheet and never was used at retail.

Article: End of Evangelion Manga Force Version
[]: End of Evangelion Manga Force Version             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Sat Jul 21, 2012 11:40 am By the way, if anyone knows... with the Manga Force version of End of Evangelion does the case ONLY look like this? What I mean is, is what it looks like there only a slipcase and on the inside it looks like the regular DVD cover? Because the cover it has there looks tacky and horrible to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Maya Ibuki » Sun Jul 22, 2012 1:36 am The Manga Force version is more like a re-print of the original Manga DVD (Like Platinum versions of Playstation games). The case inside has the MANGA FORCE logo on in it since it is a newer print. These copies are common on eBay, however are worth less since they're not original prints. They're genuine though. Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Mon Jul 23, 2012 1:42 pm Maya Ibuki wrote: The Manga Force version is more like a re-print of the original Manga DVD (Like Platinum versions of Playstation games). The case inside has the MANGA FORCE logo on in it since it is a newer print. These copies are common on eBay, however are worth less since they're not original prints. They're genuine though. Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Tue Jul 24, 2012 1:26 am This auction would seem to indicate that a variation of the US Death+Rebirth box art (it's clearly from the same Japanese source image , but recomposited along with the addition of the mandatory nanny-state ratings logo) was indeed released to market at some point. I've also seen the 2nd version w/ Kaworu's face around (like in this auction ), but not the one with a different font from the Play.com link you gave. I'm of the opinion that said picture is a promo image or something from a sell-sheet and never was used at retail.
